fault_hypothesis: The `overlaps` function on line 76 uses non-strict inequalities (`<=`, `>=`) to check for non-overlapping intervals. This incorrectly classifies adjacent (touching) slots as non-overlapping, causing the failing tests to accept conflicting candidates.

constraints.intent: The return value of overlaps should correctly identify touching intervals as overlapping.
If the loop continues, the candidate must not have a true (touching) overlap with the current slot.

spec.expr: all(sorted(merged__1)[i][1] < sorted(merged__1)[i+1][0] for i in range(len(merged__1) - 1))

constraints.intent: When a candidate is accepted, the resulting merged schedule must not contain any touching or overlapping slots.

spec.expr: not __cbfl_result[0] or all(__cbfl_result[1][i][1] < __cbfl_result[1][i+1][0] for i in range(len(__cbfl_result[1]) - 1))

constraints.intent: An accepted schedule must not contain any touching or overlapping slots.
